economic_notes: Investments in 6 hydro-electric generating stations through Lower Mattagami Energy Limited Partnership (25% ownership). 25% share in Kimesskanemenow Limited Partnership for winter road construction and maintenance. Moose Cree Constructors Inc. is a subsidiary accounted for on modified equity basis.
notes: Consolidated entities include Moose Cree Education Authority, Amisk-OO-Skow Finance Corporation, and Moose Cree Training and Employment Unit Inc. GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis include Moose Cree Group of Companies LP, Moose Cree Group GP Ltd, 1929319 Ontario Inc., and Moose Cree Constructors Inc. Portfolio investments of $140,908,262 represent 25% ownership in Lower Mattagami Energy Limited Partnership (6 hydro-electric stations). London Life loan of $61,250,604 is secured by the LMLP investment. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + Federal other + Province of Ontario + Mushkegowuk Council. Remuneration schedule not included in the provided pages.
